name: OpenClaw手机端消息推送方案
description: Forward completed assistant replies to a configurable mobile/web notification bridge.

gatewayUrl.title: Gateway URL
gatewayUrl.description: HTTP endpoint that receives forwarded reply events.

gatewayToken.title: Gateway token
gatewayToken.description: Optional bearer token for the mobile/web bridge receiver.

targetUrl.title: Target URL
targetUrl.description: Optional UI path/URL included in forwarded events.

eventType.title: Event type
eventType.description: Event type sent to the receiver.

maxBodyChars.title: Max body chars
maxBodyChars.description: Maximum short body length before truncation.

skipSubagents.title: Skip sub-agents
skipSubagents.description: Do not forward assistant replies from sub-agent sessions.

debugLogPath.title: Debug log path
debugLogPath.description: Optional local log file path. Leave empty to disable file logging.
